methodology.score_scale: 0-10, AI-generated cosy score grounded in guest reviews (score_final used, falls back to score)
methodology.city_country_name_normalization: City/country strings in source data include multiple locale spellings and geocoding artifacts (e.g. "Rome"/"Roma", "Marrakech"/"Marrakesh", "Brugge"/"Bruges", all "Praha N-District" variants/"Prague", "Österreich"/"Austria"). A manual alias map merged known duplicates before aggregation; hotels with unusable country strings (postal codes/street addresses, 79 hotels, 0.4% of total) were excluded from country-level stats. Known residual issue: a small number of cities (e.g. Edinburgh, Quebec City) have long tails of postal-code-suffixed city variants (1-4 hotels each) that were not merged into the canonical city name; because each variant is far below the n=10 city threshold individually, this does not distort the published league table, but the true hotel count for those cities is understated versus what a fully deduplicated geocode would show.
